name: All Star Limousine
recent_news: No web footprint tying 'All Star Limousine' at 7738 Bar Harbor Dr, Riverdale GA (owner Salimon Lawabl) to school transportation. A separate, larger Georgia operator 'Allstars Worldwide Limousine / Allstars Limo' (HQ 23 Rockport Dr, Riverdale GA) offers school transportation including small/mid/full-sized buses, but it is a distinct entity at a different address. Subject entity appears to be a 2-person residential-address livery business (2026).
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. Sub-scale limo, no confirmed school-bus operation; do not confuse with the larger Allstars Worldwide Limousine in Riverdale (separate company, separate address).
